title: Support Diagnostics Console
concept: A table-led support console for WordPress Playground where saved objects and transfer history drive a selected detail panel while the live WordPress preview stays protected on screen.
flows: Preview a Gutenberg PR or branch with route-specific input, validation, loading, resulting preview identity, and save/export availability
Save a temporary Playground in browser storage with file-copy progress, saved row insertion, active shell title update, and reset/reload behavior change
Distinguish local-directory saving from browser storage with folder permission and reconnect consequences
Delete a saved Playground with confirmation, deleted final row state, transfer history, and active fallback
Manage Site Manager diagnostics, files, Blueprint gallery/editor, database tools, logs, GitHub export, zip download, and zip replacement import
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest subset label
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to local directory with permission distinction
Delete saved Playground with final deleted state
Active WordPress path input and refresh
Older-version, network, and multisite capability context
Destructive reset and saved reload distinction
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint copy, download, run, validation, URL, and editor
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning state
Transfer history for saving, local permission, imported, exported, deleted, and downloaded states
